title: descurainia incana var. major
intro: Descurainia incana var. major, also known as prickly bittercress, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, providing various health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Descurainia incana var. major can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
